questions.question: Arnold Schwarzenegger stars as a killer cyborg sent back in time to kill the leader of the human resistance before he is born.
Tom Hanks stars as a FedEx executive stranded on a deserted island after a plane crash.
Guy Pearce stars as a man with short-term memory loss trying to uncover the truth about his wife's murder.
Keanu Reeves stars as a computer hacker who learns that reality is a simulation created by machines.
Bruce Willis stars as a troubled child psychologist who attempts to help an isolated young boy who is terrified of his ability to see and communicate with the dead.
Robert De Niro stars as a mentally unstable veteran working as a taxi driver in New York City.
Marlon Brando stars as the aging patriarch of a crime family in this epic mafia saga.
Harrison Ford stars as an archaeologist and adventurer in this movie franchise.
Sylvester Stallone stars as an underdog boxer who gets a shot at the heavyweight championship.
Johnny Depp stars as a swashbuckling pirate in this adventure series.
Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a poor artist who falls in love with a wealthy woman played by Kate Winslet aboard a ship that hits an iceberg.
1967 film where Clint Eastwood stars as a mysterious outlaw in a small Western town.
questions.answer: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly

questions.question: Meryl Streep stars as the powerful editor of a fashion magazine who demands perfection from her assistant.
Jodie Foster stars as a young FBI trainee tracking down a serial killer who skins his victims.
Tim Robbins stars as a man wrongfully imprisoned for the murder of his wife.
Dustin Hoffman stars as an autistic savant with extraordinary mathematical abilities.
Tom Cruise stars as a secret agent who must clear his name after being framed for the deaths of his espionage team.
Will Smith stars in this biographical film named after a legendary boxer.
Julia Roberts stars as a prostitute hired by a wealthy businessman for a week in this romantic comedy.
Brad Pitt stars as a charismatic soap salesman who forms an underground fight club with an insomniac office worker.
Jim Carrey stars as a timid bank clerk who discovers a magical mask that transforms him into a green-faced trickster.
Sandra Bullock stars as a woman who must drive a city bus after a criminal plants a bomb on it.
Keanu Reeves stars as a retired hitman who returns to the criminal underworld to seek vengeance for the death of his dog.
Matthew McConaughey stars as a defense attorney who takes on a high-profile murder case in the South.
Scarlett Johansson stars as a highly trained spy and assassin who joins a team of superheroes.
Chris Pratt stars as a roguish space adventurer who teams up with a group of misfits to save the galaxy.
Ryan Reynolds stars as a wisecracking, fast-healing mercenary with a disfigured face.
Humphrey Bogart stars as Rick Blaine, a cynical American expatriate who runs a nightclub in Casablanca during World War II.
Marlon Brando stars as Don Vito Corleone, the aging patriarch of a powerful crime family.
Anthony Perkins stars as Norman Bates, a motel owner with a disturbing secret.
Jack Nicholson stars as the Joker, a criminal mastermind who terrorizes Gotham City.
Sigourney Weaver stars as Ellen Ripley, a warrant officer battling a deadly alien aboard a spaceship.
Arnold Schwarzenegger stars as Dutch, the leader of a team of commandos hunting a predatory alien in the jungle.
Bruce Willis stars as John McClane, a New York cop who battles terrorists in a Los Angeles skyscraper.
Mel Gibson stars as Max Rockatansky, a former police officer fighting for survival in a post-apocalyptic wasteland.
Kurt Russell stars as Snake Plissken, a former soldier sent into a dystopian New York to rescue the President's daughter.
Wesley Snipes stars as a half-vampire, half-mortal warrior who hunts vampires.
Will Smith stars as Agent J, a member of a secret agency that monitors alien activity on Earth.
Tommy Lee Jones stars as Agent K, a veteran agent who trains a new recruit to monitor alien activity.
Daniel Craig stars as James Bond, a British secret agent who must stop a terrorist from destroying a new casino in Montenegro.
Clint Eastwood stars as a San Francisco police inspector who must stop a serial killer.
Charlton Heston stars as Moses, a Hebrew slave who leads his people out of Egypt.
Russell Crowe stars as Maximus, a Roman general who seeks revenge against the emperor who murdered his family.
Mel Gibson stars as William Wallace, a Scottish warrior who leads a rebellion against English rule.
Tom Hanks stars as a kind-hearted man with a low IQ who witnesses and unwittingly influences several defining historical events in the United States.
Jim Carrey stars as a man who discovers his entire life is a fabricated reality TV show.
Tom Hanks stars as a death row supervisor who encounters a man with a supernatural gift.
Adrien Brody stars as a Polish Jewish pianist who struggles to survive the destruction of the Warsaw ghetto.
Matt Damon stars as a genius janitor at MIT who solves a difficult math problem left on a chalkboard.
Leonardo DiCaprio stars as an undercover cop infiltrating the mob in Boston.
Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a frontiersman left for dead after a bear attack, seeking revenge against those who betrayed him.
Jesse Eisenberg stars as Mark Zuckerberg, the founder of Facebook, as he navigates the legal and personal challenges of creating a social network.
Leonardo DiCaprio stars as Jordan Belfort, a stockbroker who rises to wealth and infamy through fraud and corruption.
Leonardo DiCaprio stars as Howard Hughes, an eccentric aviation pioneer and filmmaker.
Will Smith stars as Chris Gardner, a struggling salesman who becomes homeless while raising his son.
Sandra Bullock stars as Leigh Anne Tuohy, a woman who takes in a homeless teenager and helps him fulfill his potential as a football player.
Emma Stone stars as Skeeter Phelan, a young writer documenting the stories of African-American maids in 1960s Mississippi.
Colin Firth stars as King George VI, who overcomes his stammer with the help of a speech therapist.
Benedict Cumberbatch stars as Alan Turing, a mathematician who helps crack the Enigma code during World War II.
Eddie Redmayne stars as Stephen Hawking, a theoretical physicist diagnosed with ALS at a young age.
Matt Damon stars as an astronaut stranded on Mars who must find a way to survive and signal Earth for rescue.
Ralph Fiennes stars as Gustave H, a legendary concierge at a famous European hotel between the wars.
Sally Hawkins stars as Elisa, a mute janitor who forms a unique bond with an amphibious creature in a secret lab.
Olivia Colman stars as Queen Anne in this dark comedy about power and favoritism in 18th-century England.
Joaquin Phoenix stars as Arthur Fleck, a mentally troubled comedian who descends into madness and becomes a criminal icon in Gotham City.
Robert De Niro stars as Frank Sheeran, a truck driver who becomes a hitman involved with the Bufalino crime family.
Meryl Streep stars as Katharine Graham, the first female publisher of a major American newspaper, during the Pentagon Papers scandal.
Gary Oldman stars as Winston Churchill during the early days of World War II, as he faces the decision of whether to negotiate with Hitler or fight on.
Samuel L. Jackson stars as Major Marquis Warren, a bounty hunter caught in a deadly game of deception in a blizzard-bound stagecoach stopover.
Tom Hardy stars as John Fitzgerald, a trappers who betrays and leaves Hugh Glass for dead in the wilderness.
Leslie Nielsen stars in this spoof of disaster movies, where a former fighter pilot must land a plane after the crew falls ill.
Rodney Dangerfield stars as a loud, obnoxious real estate developer who clashes with a snobby golf course owner.
John Belushi stars as John 'Bluto' Blutarsky, a wild fraternity member at a 1962 college.
Bradley Cooper stars as Phil Wenneck, one of three friends who wake up after a wild bachelor party in Las Vegas with no memory of the previous night.
Kristen Wiig stars as Annie Walker, a maid of honor whose life unravels as she leads her best friend and a group of colorful bridesmaids on a wild ride.
Jonah Hill stars as Seth, a high school student trying to lose his virginity before graduation in this raunchy teen comedy.
Will Ferrell and John C. Reilly are grown men who are forced to live together after their parents marry.
Will Ferrell stars as Ron Burgundy, a 1970s news anchor who struggles to adapt as his station brings in a female co-anchor.
Will Ferrell stars as Frank Ricard, a former college student who starts a fraternity near his old campus.
Will Ferrell stars as Ricky Bobby, a cocky NASCAR driver who faces a series of comedic misadventures.
Jim Carrey stars as Lloyd Christmas, one of two dim-witted best friends on a cross-country road trip.
Jim Carrey stars as Fletcher Reede, a lawyer who cannot lie for 24 hours due to his son's birthday wish.
Ben Stiller stars as Greg Focker, a male nurse who struggles to make a good impression on his girlfriend's parents.
Ben Stiller stars as a dim-witted male model caught up in a conspiracy to assassinate the Prime Minister of Malaysia.
Steve Carell stars as Andy Stitzer, a middle-aged man who has never had sex and faces pressure from his friends to lose his virginity.
Bruce Campbell stars as Ash Williams, a man who must battle demonic forces in a remote cabin in this horror-comedy.
Mel Brooks directs this parody of 'Star Wars,' where a rogue space pilot must rescue a princess from an evil empire.
Mel Brooks directs this Western comedy where a black sheriff is appointed to a racist town to clean it up.
Gene Wilder stars as Dr. Frederick Frankenstein, who attempts to recreate his grandfather's experiment to bring a corpse back to life.
Bill Murray stars as Phil Connors, a weatherman stuck in a time loop, reliving the same day over and over again.
Bill Murray stars as Dr. Peter Venkman, a parapsychologist who starts a ghost-catching business in New York City.
Bill Murray stars as Bob Harris, an aging actor who forms an unlikely friendship with a young woman in Tokyo.
Bill Murray stars as John Winger, a cab driver who joins the Army with his best friend.
Dustin Hoffman stars as Michael Dorsey, an unemployed actor who disguises himself as a woman to land a role on a soap opera.
Mel Brooks directs this comedy about two theatrical producers who scheme to get rich by overselling interests in a sure-to-flop Broadway musical.
Billy Crystal stars as Harry Burns, a man who debates whether men and women can truly be platonic friends with Meg Ryan's character over 12 years.
Heather Langenkamp stars as Nancy Thompson, a teenager haunted by a disfigured killer named Freddie Kreuger in her dreams.
Linda Blair stars as Regan MacNeil, a young girl possessed by a demonic entity.
Jack Nicholson stars as Jack Torrance, a writer who descends into madness while caretaking a haunted hotel.
Marilyn Burns stars as Sally Hardesty, a woman terrorized by a family of cannibals, including the chainsaw-wielding Leatherface.
Neve Campbell stars as Sidney Prescott, a high school student targeted by a masked killer known as Ghostface.
Naomi Watts stars as Rachel Keller, a journalist investigating a cursed videotape that kills viewers seven days after watching it.
Gene Hackman stars as Norman Dale, a high school basketball coach leading a small-town team to an unlikely championship.
Denzel Washington stars in this sports drama based on the true story of a newly racially integrated high school football team in Alexandria, Virginia in 1971.
Tom Cruise stars as a sports agent who has a moral crisis and starts his own agency.
Kevin Costner stars as a farmer who builds a baseball field in his cornfield after hearing a mysterious voice.
Robert Redford stars as a talented but troubled baseball player who gets a second chance at glory.
Kevin Costner stars as Crash Davis, a minor league catcher mentoring a young pitcher in the North Carolina league.
Charlie Sheen stars as Ricky Vaughn, a wild pitcher for the Cleveland Indians in this underdog baseball comedy.
Wesley Snipes stars as a streetball hustler who teams up with a white player to scam others on the court.
Michael Jordan stars as himself, teaming up with Bugs Bunny and the Looney Tunes to play basketball against aliens.
John Candy stars as Irving Blitzer, a disgraced Olympic bobsledder coaching the first Jamaican bobsled team.
Kurt Russell stars as Herb Brooks, the coach of the 1980 U.S. Olympic hockey team that defeats the Soviet Union.
Morgan Freeman stars as Nelson Mandela, who uses the 1995 Rugby World Cup to unite South Africa.
Tobey Maguire stars as Red Pollard, a jockey who helps an underdog racehorse become a champion.
Diane Lane stars as Penny Chenery, the owner of the legendary racehorse Secretariat.
Mark Wahlberg stars as Micky Ward, a boxer from Lowell, Massachusetts, fighting for his career and family.
Tom Hardy stars plays an ex-Marine who enters the world of mixed martial arts to save his family.
Michael B. Jordan stars as Adonis Creed, the son of Apollo Creed, who trains under Rocky Balboa to become a boxer.

Hilary Swank plays Maggie Fitzgerald, a determined, working-class amateur boxer who convinces a hardened, guilt-ridden trainer (played by Clint Eastwood) to help her achieve her dream of turning professional
Mickey Rourke stars as Randy 'The Ram' Robinson, an aging professional wrestler struggling with his career and personal life.
Steve Carell stars as John du Pont, an eccentric millionaire who sponsors Olympic wrestlers with dark intentions.
Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, the general manager of the Oakland Athletics, who uses sabermetrics to build a competitive team.
Dennis Quaid stars as Jimmy Morris, a high school baseball coach who fulfills his dream of pitching in the Major Leagues.
Keanu Reeves stars as Shane Falco, a former college quarterback brought in to lead a team of misfits during an NFL strike.
Al Pacino stars as the coach of a fictional professional football team in Miami dealing with personal and professional struggles.
Both Adam Sandler and Burt Reynolds have played Paul Crewe, a former NFL quarterback who organizes a prison football team to play against the guards.
Will Ferrell and John Heder play disgraced rival figure skaters who team up to compete in pairs skating.
Vince Vaughn plays the owner of a local gym who enters his team in a dodgeball tournament to save his business.
